title: The Fall of Berlin 1945
strengths: Provides a city population band and a city-defense troop-strength summary in the same narrative.
limitations: OCR text; the 1.5 million Soviet figure likely captures the larger Berlin assault force, not only troops physically inside the built-up core.
notes: Best single source for city-bounded civilian stock and defender strength.

title: Battle of Berlin
strengths: Summarizes a postwar survey and explicitly separates central Berlin from suburbs.
limitations: Tertiary overview; the underlying survey is not fully documented on-page and is not strong enough for a publishable core estimate.
notes: Used only as mortality context, not as the basis of the core DR path.
